name: oracle-suite
description: The working-session toolkit by Not Rest Inc. — token-lean, verified, model-agnostic, on any topic. Twenty skills from intake to handoff, all natural-language invocable: oracle (six-question intake + skill routing + the CLAUDE.md foundation), researcher, marketresearcher, explainer, decider, factcheck, introspect (validated workspace self-reports), game-forge (playtested playable games), gpt (chat-first GPT lane: guided setup, persistent chats, verified background jobs, director-safe --once), chatroom (shared Claude+GPT work rooms over append-only files), archivist (a greppable index over every dossier the project has produced — consult before re-spending a search budget), spend (an append-only model-spend ledger that makes the offload model policy checkable), stepbystep, actionplan (copy-paste runbooks), critic, director (chains skills into pipelines), fable-director (runs the '3 devs and a relay' multi-session arrangement), fable-swarm (the fast delegation arrangement: Fable seat + concurrent in-session Opus lanes, the harness as the wire), sessionend (continuity files + a live cross-session handoff line), and fable-mode — a verification-first working discipline auto-anchored into every session by the SessionStart hook. Every working skill ships auditable background + plain-language dossier outputs, a --quick mode, honesty labels backed by real tiered sources, explicit search budgets, and a self-check before finishing.
